highlights.summary: Prepare and publish Trio v0.8.0. This release updates the app version (APP_VERSION/APP_DEV_VERSION set to 0.8.0), adds multiple user-facing features and fixes (anonymous opt-out telemetry backed by Apple App Attest; therapy settings upload to Tidepool; propagation of deleted glucose entries to Nightscout; optional override/adjustment confirmation dialogs; show and cancel in-progress bolus from Treatments view; context menus for swipeable history items; settings search scroll-to and highlight; unified bolus safety checks for APNS and Shortcut boluses; fixes to Nightscout site change events; glucose smoothing now uses the newest 350 values), includes submodule syncs and various PRs listed for the v0.8.0 release, and updates some Ruby/Gem dependencies in the project Gemfile.lock.
highlights.userFacingImpact: Users will see new features and bugfixes described in the v0.8.0 release notes: telemetry (opt-out) is added, therapy settings are uploaded to Tidepool, deletions of glucose entries in the app propagate to Nightscout, confirmation dialogs can be enabled for overrides/temporary targets, active bolus progress is shown (and can be cancelled) from the Treatments screen, context menus are available as an alternative to swipe actions in history lists, settings search now scrolls-to and highlights results, bolus safety validation has been unified across APNS and Shortcut-driven boluses, Nightscout site-change false positives were fixed, and glucose smoothing now uses the newest 350 readings. The release also includes dependency updates and a version bump. These impacts are taken directly from the v0.8.0 release description and included diffs/commits; no additional behavioral assumptions are made. Human review is not required based on the provided change artifacts.

sources.title: Bump jwt to 2.10.3, faraday to 1.10.5, public_suffix to 7.0.5

The release also includes dependency updates and a version bump. These impacts are taken directly from the v0.8.0 release description and included diffs/commits; no additional behavioral assumptions are made. items.summary: Merge of release/v0.8.0 into dev to sync the new version and include the merge commit. The pull-request descriptions state: "Syncs new version + merge commit back to `dev`." (pr:gordolio/Trio#1168, pr:nightscout/Trio#1168) and commit 02648dc31713ee7342f725da78ffd6a5d853cc33 is the merge commit for this change (commit:02648dc31713ee7342f725da78ffd6a5d853cc33).
items.userFacingImpact: The supplied sources only show a version-sync merge back to dev and do not include detailed release notes or file-level changes, so user-visible functional changes cannot be determined from these sources alone. The PR descriptions point to external release notes (https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/releases/tag/v0.8.0) for details (pr:gordolio/Trio#1168, pr:nightscout/Trio#1168). Human review of the release notes or the diff is required to assess user-facing impact.

sources.title: Merge pull request #1168 from nightscout/release/v0.8.0 [skip ci]

includedPullRequests.title: Release/v0.8.0
includedPullRequests.body:
**For detailed release notes, see: https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/releases/tag/v0.8.0**

## What's Changed At A Glance

* **Anonymous opt-out Telemetry**: helps the team understand how Trio is used, backed by Apple App Attest
* **Therapy settings upload to Tidepool**: Trio now pushes basal, CR, ISF, and target settings into Tidepool alongside treatment data
* **Delete glucose from Nightscout**: glucose entries deleted in Trio now propagate to Nightscout
* **Override confirmation dialogs**: optional confirmation step before activating an override or temporary target
* **Bolus progress in Treatments view**: see the active bolus and cancel it without leaving the Treatments screen
* **Context menus** on all swipeable history list items (long-press alternative to swipe)
* **Settings Search scroll-to and highlight**: tapping a search result now scrolls to and briefly highlights the matched row
* **Bolus safety checks unified**: Shortcut-driven boluses now get the same max-bolus, max-IOB, and recent-bolus validation as APNS remote boluses
* **Nightscout site change events corrected**: fixed false positives for Medtronic, added a proper `SiteChange` event for Trio History
* **Glucose smoothing window fix**: smoothing now correctly uses the *newest* 350 readings, not the oldest
* **Submodule updates**: OmniBLE (pod keep-alive now part of `main`), DanaKit, MedtrumKit, CGMBLEKit


## All PRs Contained in v0.8.0

| PR | Title | Author |
|---|---|---|
| [#682](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/682) | Fix Nightscout site change events (primarily Medtronic & Medtrum) | [@MikePlante1](https://github.com/MikePlante1) |
| [#975](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/975) | Add therapy settings upload to Tidepool | [@blalezarian](https://github.com/blalezarian) |
| [#980](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/980) | Fix: Delete glucose entries in Nightscout API | [@ryceg](https://github.com/ryceg) |
| [#1050](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1050) | Fix enteredBy handling: remote vs. local behavior | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1051](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1051) | Add scroll-to and highlight for settings search (core) | [@gordolio](https://github.com/gordolio) |
| [#1094](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1094) | Add settingsHighlightScroll modifier to all settings sub-screens | [@gordolio](https://github.com/gordolio) |
| [#1096](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1096) | Add scroll targets and fix search index labels | [@gordolio](https://github.com/gordolio) |
| [#1108](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1108) | Shared BolusSafetyValidator for APNS and Shortcut boluses | [@bjorkert](https://github.com/bjorkert) |
| [#1111](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1111) | Add optional override/adjustment confirmation dialogs | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1113](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1113) | Sync submodules: OmniBLE, DanaKit, MedtrumKit | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1117](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1117) | Fix typo in Dynamic ISF help sheet title | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1118](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1118) | Smoothing: fix fetch to use newest 350 values | [@mountrcg](https://github.com/mountrcg) |
| [#1120](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1120) | Add context menus for swipeable history list items | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1123](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1123) | Fix delete button role in history swipe actions | [@MikePlante1](https://github.com/MikePlante1) |
| [#1124](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1124) | Fix glucose date encoding: use Int not String in AlgorithmGlucose | [@kingst](https://github.com/kingst) |
| [#1127](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1127) | Refactor History module: split files; add confirmation dialogs | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1130](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1130) | Show in-progress bolus on Treatments screen | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1132](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1132) | Fix empty help sheet on first cold tap | [@bjorkert](https://github.com/bjorkert) |
| [#1133](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1133) | Update Fastlane to 2.233.1 | [@bjorkert](https://github.com/bjorkert) |
| [#1136](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1136) | Sync submodules: CGMBLEKit, DanaKit, OmniBLE, MedtrumKit | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1149](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1149) | Add Anonymous Telemetry | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1155](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1155) | Translation updates from Crowdin | [@t1dude](https://github.com/t1dude) |
| [#1158](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1158) | Fix help buttons on Dynamic Settings page | [@bjorkert](https://github.com/bjorkert) |
| [#1161](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1161) | Fix basal rounding for small basal steps | [@bastiaanv](https://github.com/bastiaanv) |
| [#1164](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1164) | Fix Apple Health flag for telemetry | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1165](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1165) | Settings Search with scroll-to and highlight (final integration) | [@gordolio](https://github.com/gordolio) |
| [#1166](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1166) | Linting fix | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
